titleStmt.title: SII 9.492: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 492. (A.R. No. 161 of 1924.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE THIRD PRAKARA OF THE KALAHASTISVARA TEMPLE AT KALAHASTI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1435, Śrīmukha, Jyēshṭha, śu. 7, Saumyavāra corresponding to A.D. 1513 May 11 Wednesday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records the gift of a pendant (padaka) consisting of various precious stones presented by the king to the god Kāḷahastīśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . vijayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1435 saṁdu mēle naḍava śrīmukhasaṁvacharada jēṣṭha śudha 7 saumya
vāradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakruṣṇarāyamahārāyarū śrīkāḷahasti�yośva
radēvarige samarpista padaka 1 kaṁ muttu 61 pace 3 keṁpu 12 vaiḍūriya 4 nīḷeya ga 37 saha tūka ha 1 kaṁṭha 1 kaṁ
tūka ga 24¥ 2 Ubhayaṁ tūka ga 71¥ 2 kaṁ padaka 1 �yo padakavanū tamma sēveyāge samarpisi cittaistaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.492 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
